title: Crisp Citrusy Norwegian Tomato Gratin
description: A citrusy and indulgent Norwegian dish featuring tomatoes, this gratin is perfect for a dinner party. The combination of citrus and tomatoes creates a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced tomatoes with olive oil, lemon juice, orange zest, garlic, salt, and pepper until they are well coated.
In a separate pan, saute the chopped onion until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of tomatoes.
Sprinkle a third of the gruyere cheese and a third of the bread crumbs over the tomatoes.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese and bread crumbs on top.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the tomatoes are tender.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the gratin hot, garnished with additional orange zest if desired.
